name: agent-skills
description: A collection of reusable skills for AI coding agents — PR management, Gemini File Search reference, and more.

skills.name: pr-manager
skills.description: Automates creating PRs, monitoring for reviews, running codebase validation, implementing feedback, and waiting for all reviewers to finish.

skills.name: gemini-file-search
skills.description: Reference for building, debugging, or querying Google Gemini File Search API with managed RAG, FileSearchStores, and document upload.
